Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For A Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff David R. Gellman, Esq., appearing on his own behalf. Plaintiff: GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN, HARRIS & MCSPARRAN, LLP.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) TRACE A. URDAN and MARY HOSSFELD.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff David R. Gellman sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $32,028.02
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $520.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $32,548.02
Judgment signed in open court.
